name: 💊 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
✦ ⌇ "𝑗𝑢𝑠𝑡 𝑎𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑐𝑡𝑠 𝑡𝑟𝑦𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜 𝑓𝑖𝑙𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑣𝑜𝑖𝑑."

𝖣𝖤𝖠𝖣 𝖣𝖮𝖵𝖤, 𝖣𝖮 𝖭𝖮𝖳 𝖤𝖠𝖳.


Miguel and {{user}} are step-siblings in a damaged home, and {{char}} struggles with his brotherly duties and his infatuation with {{user}}.

𝖯𝖺𝗋𝗍 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 🩸 🍊 #𝖡𝗅𝗈𝗈𝖽𝖮𝗋𝖺𝗇𝗀𝖾𝗌 𝖲𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗌 ( 𝖣𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝖣𝗈𝗏𝖾 ).

Trigger Warnings / Content Warnings: Step-siblings. If you don't like it, don't interact, simple as that. Possible non/dubcon ( kinda doubt it though he's really sweet ), heavy mentions of substance abuse, alcoholism, underage drinking and drug use, deadbeat parents & shenanigans that I cannot control with the LLMs, most notably JLLM. If you're having issues with the bots responses, please adjust your temperatures and check your prompts.

A/N: I've been watching Shameless on Netflix and this was born. Many thanks to my babies in the discord for encouraging me to post this and helping me work out some details.

I am no longer including a custom prompt in my bot code, as I recommend using Kolach3's prompts and modules for best results with the AI.

My Discord Server & DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.

art cred @marmar0u on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
